title: Review fall-prevention protocol for Oakridge memory care
body: 2 falls in Hallway A in the last 72h. Consider reviewing grab-bar placement and overnight rounding cadence with the DON.

citations.excerpt: Resident fall near Hallway A. No injury reported.
Resident fall in Hallway A bathroom. Hip bruising.

title: Escalate missed-dose streak on Homewood Resident A
body: 3 missed doses in the last 24h. Confirm nurse on duty acknowledges and opens a care-plan review.
